summary: The diff adds the App.tsx with a PhoneStorm promotional banner referenced in the file summary, and sets up the project infrastructure. However, the actual image file (phonestorm-banner.dim_1024x1024.png) is not present in the diff under frontend/public/assets/generated/, which is a key acceptance criterion. The App.tsx file content is truncated but the file summary confirms it includes the PhoneStorm banner. The image asset placement cannot be confirmed from the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: The PhoneStorm promotional image (phonestorm-banner.dim_1024x1024.png) must be placed in frontend/public/assets/generated/
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no file added at frontend/public/assets/generated/phonestorm-banner.dim_1024x1024.png. The image asset file itself is not present among the added files.
